title: スプリンターズSの後に・『速さ』

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Taiki, you're amazing! You've really improved
since last year!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
That was electrifying! I watched the whole thing
with bated breath!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Thank ya, thank ya! Was that exciting enough for
y'all?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Well, I don't plan on stopping anytime soon! I'm
gonna keep on runnin' just like this!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yeah! G1 sprint number two in the bag!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I could see everybody's eyes shining clear as day!
Ain't no doubt they were lovin' me!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: These legs of mine ain't done yet!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Now that we're done here, I've got an inkling
about what our next race is gonna be!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, we're going to wrap up the year with
the same race as last year—the battle to decide
the fall King of the Mile...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yeehaaaw! It's finally here! The race for the King
of the Mile!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna rule as king of the spring and the fall!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Ain't nobody gonna steal my throne!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the lofty goal of total domination over the
G1 dual miles and the fall G1 sprint, Taiki Shuttle
turns her focus to the Mile Championship!
